_comment: Personal categorization rules — copy this file to config/rules.json (git-ignored) and add your own. Rules are checked BEFORE the built-in keyword rules in scripts/categorize.py, so they win ties. Keywords are case-insensitive substring matches on the transaction description. Mirror them in config/local_profile.js as window.LOCAL_RULES so the dashboard agrees. For one-off corrections to a single transaction, use config/overrides.json instead.
